Description: Could not locate a dedicated WhatsApp section in the platform. Need clarification on where it is located or if it is still under development.
How can existing leads be imported into the system?
Confirm/support bulk lead import via CSV, Excel, API, or other methods.
WhatsApp AI Agent and AI Calling Agent should be completely separate sections with their own dashboards, settings, analytics, and workflows. Currently not clearly separated.
After leads are filtered through WhatsApp conversations or AI calling, where can qualified/interested leads be viewed?
Need a dedicated dashboard/CRM section storing filtered leads along with conversation history, call recordings, transcripts, lead status, and follow-up actions.
Do phone numbers need to be entered manually one by one to initiate AI calls?
Support uploading a list of leads and letting the AI Calling Agent automatically call each lead, qualify them based on predefined criteria, and save only interested prospects into the CRM.
If automatic calling is supported, how is the workflow configured?

End-to-end automation: bulk import leads; auto-initiate AI calls/WhatsApp conversations; qualify leads based on predefined conditions; store only interested/qualified leads in CRM; generate reports and analytics for the sales team.

Current UI is functional but feels basic. As an AI-powered SaaS platform, it should have a more modern, premium, professional appearance with better layouts, dashboards, visual hierarchy, and overall UX.
